name: Jeremy Hotz
blurb: Born in Cape Town and raised in Ottawa, he began performing in 1984 and broke through with a celebrated 1997 appearance at the Just for Laughs festival.
bio: Jeremy Hotz is a Canadian-American stand-up comedian known for a hangdog, mumbling delivery and a perpetually exasperated stage persona. Born in Cape Town and raised in Ottawa, he began performing in 1984 and broke through with a celebrated 1997 appearance at the Just for Laughs festival. He won a Gemini Award for the series The Newsroom and received the Dave Broadfoot Comic Genius Award in 2008.

timeline.ev: Begins his stand-up career at Yuk Yuk's in Ottawa
Earns a standing ovation at the Just for Laughs television gala
Wins a Gemini Award for his role on The Newsroom
Receives the Dave Broadfoot Comic Genius Award
Releases the one-hour special Dangerously Handsome

accolades: Dave Broadfoot Comic Genius Award, Canadian Comedy Awards 2008
Gemini Award for the series The Newsroom
